title: Fix task totals always showing page count

log.context: Fix task totals always showing page count

Both pushed and service restarted. Here's a summary of what was done:

**Root cause:** The `/api/tasks` endpoint already returned `total` (full dataset count), which the frontend correctly used for the "total" pill. However, all other status counts (`in_progress`, `done`, `stale`, `failed`, `background`, `foreground`) were computed client-side by iterating over the paginated 50-task array — so they only reflected the current page.

**Changes:**
